mapper.select:
SELECT p.* FROM share_projects p
INNER JOIN share_project_tags pt ON p.id = pt.project_id AND pt.tag_id = #{q.tagId}
WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC ORDER BY p.like_count DESC AND p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY (p.like_count * 3 + p.favorite_count * 2 + p.view_count * 1) DESC ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
